description: Define business case, problem statement, goal statement, scope, timeline, and team roles
notes: Order fulfillment error rate at 8.3% vs target of 2%; estimated annual cost of errors: EUR 145K

description: Map all stakeholders affected by order fulfillment process; document their requirements and expectations
notes: Key stakeholders: Warehouse Mgr, CS Lead, Logistics Director, IT Lead, 3 key customers

description: Translate Voice of Customer into Critical-to-Quality characteristics with measurable specifications
notes: CTQs: Order accuracy >98%, Delivery time <48h, Damage rate <0.5%, Label accuracy 100%

description: Map high-level process: Suppliers, Inputs, Process steps, Outputs, Customers
notes: 12 major process steps identified from order receipt to delivery confirmation

description: Define what data to collect, how, sample size, and measurement system analysis approach
notes: 30 days of order data; 100% capture of errors; categorized by type, shift, product line

description: Perform Gage R&R or attribute agreement analysis to ensure measurement reliability
notes: Attribute agreement: 94% between inspectors after calibration training

description: Gather current process performance data per the collection plan over 30-day period
notes: 4,832 orders processed; 401 errors found; 8.3% error rate confirmed

description: Determine current sigma level, Cp, Cpk; establish baseline performance metrics
notes: Current sigma level: 2.9; Cp: 0.72; Cpk: 0.68; DPMO: 83,000

description: Identify vital few error categories using Pareto chart (80/20 rule)
notes: Top 3 error types account for 78%: wrong SKU picked (34%), incorrect qty (26%), wrong address label (18%)

description: Detailed current-state value stream map with cycle times, wait times, rework loops
notes: Total lead time: 6.2 hours; Value-added time: 1.8 hours; VA ratio: 29%

description: Use fishbone diagram, 5-Why analysis, and statistical testing to identify root causes
notes: Root causes: manual pick lists (no barcode scan), shift handover gaps, outdated SKU database, poor bin labeling

description: Hypothesis testing, regression analysis, chi-square tests to statistically confirm root causes
notes: Night shift error rate 12.1% vs day shift 5.8% (p<0.001); manual picks 4x more errors than scanned

description: Brainstorm and evaluate solutions using impact/effort matrix; select top improvements
notes: Selected: barcode scanning system, real-time SKU sync, digital shift handover checklist, bin relabeling

description: Implement handheld scanner validation at pick station in Zone A as pilot
notes: Zone A error rate dropped from 8.3% to 1.9% during 2-week pilot; ROI positive in 4 months

description: Deploy all selected improvements across all warehouse zones and shifts
notes: Zones A and B complete; Zone C in progress; digital handover checklist live for all shifts

description: Measure post-improvement performance; compare to baseline using statistical tests
notes: Scheduled after full rollout completion

description: Document control methods for each critical X; define response plans for out-of-control conditions
notes: Will include SPC charts for daily error rate monitoring

description: Set up real-time SPC dashboards for error rate, pick accuracy, and delivery time
notes: Connexx platform will host automated control charts

description: Update SOPs, create training materials, document new process standards
notes: Include video walkthroughs for scanner system and handover process

description: Final report, lessons learned, ROI calculation, handover to process owners
notes: Target: error rate <2%, annual savings >EUR 120K, sigma level >4.0
